title: Sealapack Ready to Use Cling Film, 30 Metre Roll, Clear, White
features: MULTI-PURPOSE: Sealapack Cling Film provides 30 metres on a ready to use roll. Perfect all-rounder for all kinds of food storage. Wrap foods when cool to protect and prevent transfer of food odours in storage
KEEP IT FRESH & COMPACT: Wrap foods to keep fresh, cover bowls or plates to store in the fridge. Use the size you need for compact covers and wraps

FREEZE & SAVE : Reduce food waste, wrap cooked foods to save for a later meal. Chop fresh foods, wrap and freeze. Cost saving, bulk buy and separate, perfect for wrapping chicken,chops,fish or burgers in portion sizes to suit you.
SEAL IN FLAVOUR: Wrap foods when cool to protect and prevent transfer of food odours in storage
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: ROLL 30CM x 30 METRE ROLL
